lessons.title: Course Introduction
topics: Scenario: modeling real-world objects as classes

modules.name: Introduction to Advanced Python and Object-Oriented Programming
modules.description: Anonymous functions, functional programming patterns, OOP fundamentals, web scraping, and working with APIs.

topics: Four pillars: encapsulation, abstraction, inheritance, polymorphism

lessons.title: Working with APIs
topics: REST APIs and the requests library

modules.name: Classes
modules.description: Building classes in Python — creation through inheritance, composition, and interfaces.

lessons.title: Classes Part 1
topics: What are classes? Blueprints for objects

modules.name: Magic Methods
modules.description: Python dunder methods — object lifecycle, comparisons, and custom operator behavior.

modules.name: Decorators
modules.description: Extending functions and classes without modifying existing code.

lessons.title: Decorators
topics: What is a decorator? Syntactic sugar

modules.name: Generators and Iterators
modules.description: Understanding iteration — iterators, generators, and itertools.

modules.name: Data Classes
modules.description: Simplifying class creation for data-focused objects using dataclasses.

modules.name: Python and the Web
modules.description: Applying Python to web-based tasks — HTTP services, JSON, and web scraping.

lessons.title: Internet Services
topics: How the web works for Python developers

lessons.title: HTTP JSON Services
topics: Consuming HTTP JSON services in Python

assessment.title: Summative Assessment: Holiday Tracker
items: Design a text-based Holiday Tracker application
Create Holiday and HolidayList classes using OOP
Load holidays from JSON and web scraping
Apply magic methods, data classes, and API integration
